260.reason: [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND for a single '&', which is invalid; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' is encountered, it should not be assigned a token type (AND) because it's an error. The code should not set curLexType to AND, as this will cause an incorrect token to be added later.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND for a single '&', which is invalid; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND for single '&'; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]

274.reason: [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR for a single '|', which is invalid; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR for a single '|', which is invalid; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR for single '|'; should not assign a valid token type when an error occurs]

386.reason: [Error: This line adds a token even when an error has been detected (for single '&' or '|'). The token should not be added when an error occurs, as it will produce incorrect output for correct programs and may interfere with error detection.]

The token should not be added when an error occurs, as it will produce incorrect output for correct programs and may interfere with error detection.]

245.reason: // Error: if '&' is the last character on the line, this condition fails and no error is recorded for the single '&'.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  // Error: if '&' is the last character on the line, this condition fails and no error is recorded for the single '&'.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing handling when curpos >= line.length() (i.e., '&' at end of line): should record error type 'a' and create token.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  When '&' is the last character on a line, curpos equals line.length(), making this condition false. The code skips the entire block, failing to record the lexical error 'a' and leaving 'name' as null.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing else branch to handle '&' at the end of the line, causing the lexical error to be silently ignored.

257.reason: // Error: similarly, if '|' is the last character, the error is not reported.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  // Error: similarly, if '|' is the last character, the error is not reported.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Same issue: if '|' is the last character on the line, no error is recorded and no token is generated.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  When '|' is the last character on a line, curpos equals line.length(), making this condition false. The code skips the entire block, failing to record the lexical error 'a' and leaving 'name' as null.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing else branch to handle '|' at the end of the line, causing the lexical error to be silently ignored.
